caption: The video appears to be an educational presentation on the topic of rural community food systems, focusing on sustainability and localization. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking about the content displayed. The main part of the screen shows a detailed diagram with various elements connected by arrows, illustrating the relationships between different components of the food system. Key terms such as "Availability," "Retailers willing to source local," and "Sustainable Consumption" are highlighted, indicating their importance in the discussion. The left side of the screen provides an introduction to the topic, explaining what constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community and emphasizing sourcing locally owned and operated entities that benefit the community. The session videos and references listed suggest that this is part of a series of presentations aimed at developing a comprehensive model for sustainable rural food systems.
